briefdescription.para: This function macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Audio Generator core.
is the register offset of the register

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XAudGen_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the Audio Generator core.
is the register offset of the register
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XAudGen_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
